source: IMG_7948 — client-provided reference for target aesthetic
description: Japanese vet clinic '本日のご様子' (today's update) photo card. A real pet photo overlaid with delicate hand-drawn accents and handwritten Japanese status bubbles.

overall_aesthetic.mood: warm, intimate, kawaii but restrained, handcrafted
overall_aesthetic.feel: like a school nurse's note or a personal scrapbook page — NOT commercial illustration
overall_aesthetic.color_temperature: warm cream/beige base with soft pastel accents
overall_aesthetic.density: RESTRAINED — empty space matters. The pet photo is the hero, accents are supporting cast
overall_aesthetic.key_differentiator_from_AI_look: All non-photo elements look like REAL PEN strokes on paper — slightly wobbly lines, imperfect spacing, low saturation, no digital gradients

pet.rendering: ABSOLUTELY UNMODIFIED real photograph — fur texture, eyes, lighting, blanket, all preserved exactly
pet.position: center of the frame, occupies ~50% of canvas

background.type: real photograph — beige patterned blanket / sofa

paw_prints.size: very small, ~3-4% of canvas width each
paw_prints.style: simple — 1 large pad + 4 small toe dots, like a real ink stamp
paw_prints.placement: corners (top-left, top-right, bottom-left, bottom-right) and 1-2 along edges
paw_prints.imperfection: slightly uneven ink density, like a faded rubber stamp

hearts.style: OPEN OUTLINE only (not filled), single hand-drawn line with slight wobble
hearts.placement: anchored next to bubbles as decoration, or scattered in margins

stars_or_flowers.style: 5-petal flower outline OR simple 5-point star outline, all tiny

arrows.count: 3-4 small curved arrows pointing from bubbles toward the pet's body parts (face, paws, fur, body)
arrows.style: hand-drawn thin line with simple arrowhead, slightly curved, casual not precise

title_decoration.elements: small em-dash strokes + tiny paw print silhouettes flanking the title text
title_decoration.function: frame the title '本日のご様子をお送りします'

edge_frame.type: thin cream/ivory torn-paper border around all four edges
edge_frame.opacity: subtle — lets the photo show through, just enough to soften the corners

bubbles_and_text.rendered_by: HTML/CSS overlay (NOT the AI image model)
bubbles_and_text.outline: single thin brown/grey ink line (#3B2A1F) with slight wobble
bubbles_and_text.text_style: handwritten Japanese — soft, casual, slightly cursive
bubbles_and_text.left_accent_dot: small colored dot before each title (pink / mint / accent)
content_examples: 食欲あります / ごはんをしっかり完食してくれました！
お水も飲めています / おトイレも問題ありません
リラックスして過ごしています / 落ち着いていて、安心しています
元気にしています / お部屋の中で少し動いたり、おもちゃで遊んだりしています
毛並みもきれいです / ふわふわで体調も安定しています

what_the_AI_must_produce: ONLY the real photo + the hand_drawn_overlays section above. NO bubbles, NO text, NO letters of any language. Bubbles and text are added by HTML/CSS.
what_makes_AI_generations_fail: Treating decorations as commercial stickers (too bold, too saturated)
Modifying the pet itself (redrawing fur, eyes, pose)
Adding bubbles or text inside the image (we want truly transparent bubbles via HTML)
Using digital gradients or vector-clean lines (must look like real pen)
Filled hearts instead of open outline hearts
Adding cute mascot characters or extra animals
what_makes_AI_generations_succeed: Restraint — fewer, smaller, more delicate accents
Faded ink colors (cream, dusty pink, soft yellow) — NOT vivid colors
Slight imperfection in lines and stamps (human-hand feel)
Empty margin space is GOOD — let the photo breathe
Soft cream torn-paper edge frame to hide harsh photo edges
